selected.name: DEMO/USDT 4h Mean-Reversion (range, confirmed turn)
selected.description: Eligible only in a low-ADX range; buy a CONFIRMED reversion turn off the range floor (2-of-3 confluence), exit at the band mean.
entry_rules: at_least 2 of [rsi_14 crosses_above 35; close > open; macd_hist rising]
selected.reasoning: Mean-reversion (regime-gated): only in a low-ADX range, buy a confirmed turn (2-of-3 of {RSI reclaim, up-close, MACD rising}) that has reclaimed the range floor; exit at the band mean. No knife-catching in trends. No live signal supplied; parameters held at neutral defaults. [walk-forward: 10 OOS windows, beat buy&hold in 100%; median OOS +9.18% vs benchmark +1.36%; OOS Sharpe 10.62, OOS maxDD 2.4%, 113 trades, risk_score 98/100.]

criteria.rule: Pre-registered before results: TRADE-eligible iff (1) median OOS return > median buy&hold, (2) beat benchmark in >= 60% of OOS windows, (3) Sharpe >= 1.0 AND max drawdown <= 25%.

summary: TRADE: DEMO/USDT 4h Mean-Reversion (range, confirmed turn) on DEMO/USDT 4h.
